title: Claude 5.1 Confirmed: What Happens After The Fable 5 Ban?
summary: A YouTube video claims Claude 5 (called Fable) was banned by the U.S. government 76 hours after launch due to advanced capabilities, citing benchmark scores and alleged covert throttling. The video analyzes competitive standing against GPT-5.5, Gemini, and DeepSeek while discussing regulatory risk and leverage theory around Altman and OpenAI.
writeup: This AI Master video claims that Claude 5, referred to as Fable, was banned by the U.S. government 76 hours after launch over its advanced capabilities, pointing to benchmark scores and alleged covert throttling of inference throughput. It maps the model's competitive standing against GPT-5.5, Gemini, and DeepSeek while framing the regulatory stakes around code generation and AI safety. The discussion extends to leverage theory involving Altman and OpenAI. The central claims about the ban and throttling are presented as allegations rather than confirmed facts.
